title: neolitsea buisanensis f. buisanensis
intro: Neolitsea buisanensis f. buisanensis is a plant species in the Neolitsea genus, which is a type of evergreen tree native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neolitsea buisanensis f. buisanensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
